rulings.Case Title: LUISA NICHOLS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 15, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. Defendant United Technologies Corp.¿s motion to compel further responses to discovery and request for sanctions: hearing required. Per the March 3 order, no tentative ruling will be issued. The hearing will be at 1 pm, not 9 am. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 15, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 2. rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing Re Petition Of Mary Francis Nelson To Perpetuate Testimony Of Chewster Nelson By Videotaped Oral Deposition
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MARCH 15, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 3. Petitioner Mary Francis Nelson¿s petition to perpetuate testimony of Chester Nelson by videotaped oral deposition is granted as to all prospective defendants named in the petition except Frederick Meiswinkel, Inc. and Swinerton Builders, as to whom the petition is denied without prejudice to being refiled with further information. Only Frederick Meiswinkel, Inc. and Swinerton Builders filed any opposition papers. The petition fails to explain why Mr. Nelson is now expected to offer testimony against Frederick Meiswinkel, Inc. and Swinerton Builders when he did not do so in his personal injury action. The hearing will be at 1 pm, not 9 am. = (220/HEK)
